case_title: CHARLES E. LEONARD VS. MERCEDES VEGVARY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY LEONARD, CHARLES E. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-31-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: MIMI DELUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.40 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONARD, CHARLES E. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONARD, CHARLES E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,380.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 THEREBY FORFEITING THE RIGHT TO RETAIN ANY PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. HAD 1950.5 BEEN COMPLIED WITH, THEN DEFENDANT COULD HAVE RIGHTFULLY RETAINED THE DEPOSIT DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S BREACH OF THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VEGVARY, MERCEDES
